import React from 'react'; const About = () => { return (

About Animal Helper

Connecting pet parents with the best care instantly.

Our Mission 🎯

We believe that every animal deserves access to immediate and high-quality care. Animal Helper was built to bridge the gap between pet parents, animal lovers, and essential pet-related services across India.

How it Works 🛠️

Simply enter your 6-digit Indian Pincode, select the type of service you need (such as Veterinary, Grooming, or an NGO), and our system will instantly calculate and find the absolute closest resources within a 5-kilometer radius.

Get Involved ❤️

Are you an animal shelter, a veterinary clinic, or an individual offering pet first aid? Join our network to become easily discoverable by people in your local community!

); }; export default About;
